pi_items.source: Task description (step 3): 'Change its Title to: Pay on Pickup' and verified by verifier.py line 63 which enforces this exact title (case-insensitive match)
Task description (step 2): 'Enable the Cash on delivery method' and verified by verifier.py line 54 which checks that enabled equals 'yes'

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring WooCommerce Cash on Delivery (COD) payment method with two verified settings: (1) the method's title must be set to 'Pay on Pickup' (as explicitly stated in the task description), and (2) the method must be enabled (set to 'yes'). The task also requires restricting COD availability to only the 'Local Pickup' shipping method, excluding 'Flat Rate'. All data in this task is synthetic, generated programmatically within the WooCommerce test environment via the setup_task.sh script, with shipping zones and methods created dynamically.
